evals.prompt: Create a shared package for interacting with the Stripe API. Needs a client class, config dataclass, and webhook verification.
evals.expected_output: Complete package at packages/stripe/ with client, types, and pyproject.toml
expectations: pyproject.toml includes project name, version, description, and requires-python >= 3.12
Types/config defined in a separate types.py using dataclasses
Client class is async with proper cleanup method
Uses Settings class pattern for API key, not os.getenv

evals.prompt: Extract our common email sending logic into a shared package. Support multiple providers (sendgrid, ses) with a unified interface.
evals.expected_output: Shared email package with provider abstraction
expectations: Package at packages/email/ with proper structure
Has a base client or protocol that providers implement
Provider enum or config for selecting provider
Singleton pattern or factory function for getting client instance
Feature flag check function (is_enabled) using Settings
